name: Heartless
short_description: It's a 3D action game called Heartless. Heartless has the story of the protagonist struggling to escape the looming threat. Please enjoy the deep story and action with good hitting sense.
detailed_description:
The protagonist happened to be involved in an incident.
Will she be able to escape from the upcoming threats and survive?

[Heartless] is a single play action TPS game that follows the story.
Become the [Heartless] hero and enter the world now.

[Heartless] offers the following play:
Four or more types of guns action plays
Undercover assassination action play
A new story, and a new world

Caution: Heartless is the first project game of Cresent, a Korean college indie game development team. It's a game that lacks a lot and leaves a lot of room for improvement, but please play with a broad mind. Thank you.
